  ¬∑ obtain ‚ü®_, ‚ü®c, hc‚ü©, h, hh, hch‚ü© := hx

    exact ‚ü®(hH‚āÄH‚āĀ ‚ü®h, ŌÜ h‚ü©).mpr ‚ü®hh, by rw [sub_self]; apply zero_mem‚ü©, rfl‚ü©

query: cardinality of a finite set is monotone under inclusion

context.enclosing_signature: (h‚āÄA : A.Nonempty) (hA : Nat.card (A + A) ‚Č§ K * A.ncard) : ‚ąÉ (H : Submodule (ZMod 2) G) (c : Set G), Nat.card c ‚Č§ K ^ 6 * A.ncard ^ (1/2) * (H : Set G).ncard ^ (-1/2) ‚ąß (H : Set G).ncard ‚Č§ K ^ 10 * A.ncard ‚ąß A.ncard ‚Č§ K ^ 10 * (H : Set G).ncard ‚ąß A ‚äÜ c + H
hypotheses: p : refPackage ő©‚āÄ ő©‚āÄ G := { X‚āÄ‚āĀ := UA, X‚āÄ‚āā := UA, hmeas1 := UAmeas, hmeas2 := UAmeas, ő∑ := 1 / 8, hő∑ := ‚čĮ, hő∑' := ‚čĮ }
hUH : d[p.X‚āÄ‚āĀ # UH] + d[p.X‚āÄ‚āā # UH] ‚Č§ 10 * d[p.X‚āÄ‚āĀ # p.X‚āÄ‚āā]
I : log K * -5 + log ‚ÜĎ(Nat.card ‚ÜĎA) * (-1 / 2) + log ‚ÜĎ(Nat.card ‚Ü•H) * (-1 / 2) ‚Č§ -H[VA - VH]
prior_tactics: have : (0 : ‚ĄĚ) < Nat.card (A ‚ą© (H + {x‚āÄ}) : Set G) := lt_of_lt_of_le (by positivity) J

simp only [Nat.card_eq_fintype_card, card_of_isEmpty, CharP.cast_eq_zero, lt_self_iff_false,
  not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.1 h'] at this

calc
  (Nat.card (A + A ‚ą© (‚ÜĎH + {x‚āÄ})) : ‚ĄĚ)
  _ ‚Č§ Nat.card (A + A) := by
    gcongr; exact Nat.card_mono (toFinite _) <| add_subset_add_left inter_subset_left
  _ ‚Č§ K * Nat.card A := hA
  _ = (K ^ 6 * Nat.card A ^ (1/2 : ‚ĄĚ) * Nat.card H ^ (-1/2 : ‚ĄĚ)) *
      (K ^ (-5 : ‚ĄĚ) * Nat.card A ^ (1/2 : ‚ĄĚ) * Nat.card H ^ (1/2 : ‚ĄĚ)) := by
    rpow_ring; norm_num
  _ ‚Č§ (K ^ 6 * Nat.card A ^ (1/2 : ‚ĄĚ) * Nat.card H ^ (-1/2 : ‚ĄĚ)) *
    Nat.card ‚ÜĎ(A ‚ą© (‚ÜĎH + {x‚āÄ})) := by gcongr

prior_tactics:
obtain ‚ü®r, hr‚ü© : ‚ąÉ (r : ‚ĄĚ), ‚ąÄ x ‚ąą Finset.univ, (őĹX.real {x}) = r * őĹY.real {x} := by

prior_tactics:
¬∑ simp only [negMulLog, neg_mul, smul_eq_mul, mul_neg, Finset.sum_neg_distrib]
  rw [neg_div, Finset.sum_div]
  congr 1
  apply Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun i hi ‚Ü¶ ?_)
  rcases eq_or_lt_of_le (hb i hi) with h'i | h'i
  ¬∑ simp [‚Üź h'i, habs i hi h'i.symm]
  ¬∑ field_simp
    ring

¬∑ have : ‚ąĎ x ‚ąą s, b x / B * (a x / b x) = (‚ąĎ x ‚ąą s, a x) / B := by
    rw [Finset.sum_div]
    apply Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun i hi ‚Ü¶ ?_)
    rcases eq_or_lt_of_le (hb i hi) with h'i | h'i
    ¬∑ simp [‚Üź h'i, habs i hi h'i.symm]
    ¬∑ field_simp
      ring
  simp only [negMulLog, smul_eq_mul, neg_mul, this]
  ring
have A : ‚ąĎ i ‚ąą s, b i = ‚ąĎ i ‚ąą s, 0 := Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun i hi ‚Ü¶ h i hi)

have B : ‚ąĎ i ‚ąą s, a i * log (a i / b i) = ‚ąĎ i ‚ąą s, a i * log (a i / 0) := by
  apply Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun i hi ‚Ü¶ by simp [h i hi])

    let perm := MeasurableEquiv.piCongrLeft (fun _ ‚Ü¶ G) ŌÜ

      intro i _

query: entropy equals when the measures are equal

context.enclosing_signature: {m : ‚Ąē} {ő© : Fin m ‚Üí Type*} (hő© : ‚ąÄ i, MeasureSpace (ő© i)) (hő©prob : ‚ąÄ i, IsProbabilityMeasure (hő© i).volume) (X : ‚ąÄ i, ő© i ‚Üí G) (ŌÜ : Equiv.Perm (Fin m)) : D[fun i ‚Ü¶ X (ŌÜ i); fun i ‚Ü¶ hő© (ŌÜ i)] = D[X ; hő©]
context.goal: ‚äĘ H[fun x => ‚ąĎ i, x i ; Measure.pi fun i => Measure.map (X (ŌÜ i)) ‚Ąô] = H[fun x => ‚ąĎ i, x i ; Measure.pi fun i => Measure.map (X i) ‚Ąô]
hypotheses: X : (i : Fin m) ‚Üí ő© i ‚Üí G
prior_tactics:
¬∑ apply IdentDistrib.entropy_congr
  exact {
    aemeasurable_fst := by
      apply Measurable.aemeasurable
      apply Finset.measurable_sum
      intro i _
      exact measurable_pi_apply i
    aemeasurable_snd := by
      apply Measurable.aemeasurable
      apply Finset.measurable_sum
      intro i _
      exact measurable_pi_apply i
    map_eq := by
      let sum := fun x : Fin m ‚Üí G ‚Ü¶ ‚ąĎ i, x i
      let perm := MeasurableEquiv.piCongrLeft (fun _ ‚Ü¶ G) ŌÜ
      have perm_apply : ‚ąÄ (i : Fin m) (x : Fin m ‚Üí G), perm x i = x (ŌÜ.symm i) := by
            intro i x
            simp only [perm]
            rw [MeasurableEquiv.coe_piCongrLeft, Equiv.piCongrLeft_apply]
            simp only [eq_rec_constant]
      have invar : sum ‚ąė perm = sum := by
        ext x
        rw [comp_apply]
        convert Finset.sum_bijective ŌÜ.symm (Equiv.bijective ŌÜ.symm) ?_ ?_
        ¬∑ simp only [Finset.mem_univ, implies_true]
        intro i _
        rw [perm_apply i x]
      calc
        _ = Measure.map (sum ‚ąė perm) (Measure.pi fun i ‚Ü¶ Measure.map (X (ŌÜ i)) ‚Ąô) := by rw [invar]
        _ = Measure.map sum (Measure.map perm (Measure.pi fun i ‚Ü¶ Measure.map (X (ŌÜ i)) ‚Ąô)) := by
          rw [Measure.map_map]
          ¬∑ apply Finset.measurable_sum
            intro i _
            exact measurable_pi_apply i
          apply measurable_pi_lambda
          intro i
          have : (fun x : Fin m ‚Üí G ‚Ü¶ perm x i) = (fun x : Fin m ‚Üí G ‚Ü¶ x (ŌÜ.symm i)) := by
            ext x
            exact perm_apply i x
          rw [this]
          exact measurable_pi_apply ((Equiv.symm ŌÜ) i)
        _ = _ := by
          congr
          exact (MeasureTheory.measurePreserving_piCongrLeft (fun i ‚Ü¶ Measure.map (X i) ‚Ąô) ŌÜ).map_eq
  }

. set S : Finset (Fin 2 √ó Fin m) := Finset.map (Function.Embedding.sectR (0:Fin 2) (Fin m)) Finset.univ

    rw [Finset.sum_attach S (fun i ‚Ü¶ X' i ŌČ)]
    simp [S]

  rw [Finset.sum_attach S' (fun i ‚Ü¶ X' i ŌČ)]
  simp [S']

A : d[X‚āĀ' | X‚āĀ' + X‚āā' # X‚āĀ | X‚āĀ + X‚āā] = d[X‚āĀ | X‚āĀ + X‚āā' # X‚āĀ' | X‚āā + X‚āĀ']

have J z w : d[X‚āĀ ; ‚Ąô[|(X‚āĀ + X‚āā') ‚ĀĽ¬Ļ' {z}] # X‚āĀ' ; ‚Ąô[|(X‚āā + X‚āĀ') ‚ĀĽ¬Ļ' {w}]]
    = d[X‚āĀ ; ‚Ąô[|(X‚āĀ + X‚āā') ‚ĀĽ¬Ļ' {z}] # X‚āā ; ‚Ąô[|(X‚āā + X‚āĀ') ‚ĀĽ¬Ļ' {w}]] := by

context.enclosing_signature: : d[X‚āĀ # X‚āĀ] + d[X‚āā # X‚āā] = d[X‚āĀ + X‚āā' # X‚āā + X‚āĀ'] + d[X‚āĀ | X‚āĀ + X‚āā' # X‚āā | X‚āā + X‚āĀ'] + I‚āā
context.goal: ‚äĘ d[X‚āĀ' + X‚āā' # X‚āĀ + X‚āā] = d[X‚āĀ + X‚āā' # X‚āā + X‚āĀ']
hypotheses: X‚āĀ X‚āā X‚āĀ' X‚āā' : ő© ‚Üí G
d[X‚āĀ' + X‚āā' # X‚āĀ + X‚āā] + d[X‚āĀ' | X‚āĀ' + X‚āā' # X‚āĀ | X‚āĀ + X‚āā] + I[X‚āĀ' + X‚āĀ : X‚āĀ + X‚āā|X‚āĀ' + X‚āĀ + X‚āā' + X‚āā]
C‚āĀ : X‚āĀ' + X‚āĀ + X‚āā' + X‚āā = X‚āĀ + X‚āā + X‚āĀ' + X‚āā'
prior_tactics:
have C‚āÖ : d[X‚āĀ' + X‚āā' # X‚āĀ + X‚āā] = d[X‚āĀ + X‚āā' # X‚āā + X‚āĀ'] := by
  apply IdentDistrib.rdist_congr
  ¬∑ apply h‚āĀ.symm.add (.refl hX‚āā'.aemeasurable)
    ¬∑ simpa using h_indep.indepFun (show (2 : Fin 4) ‚Č† 3 by decide)
    ¬∑ simpa using h_indep.indepFun (show (0 : Fin 4) ‚Č† 3 by decide)
  ¬∑ rw [add_comm]
    refine .add (.refl hX‚āā.aemeasurable) h‚āĀ ?_ ?_
    ¬∑ simpa using h_indep.indepFun (show (1 : Fin 4) ‚Č† 0 by decide)
    ¬∑ simpa using h_indep.indepFun (show (1 : Fin 4) ‚Č† 2 by decide)

have C‚āÜ : d[X‚āĀ' | X‚āĀ' + X‚āā' # X‚āĀ | X‚āĀ + X‚āā] = d[X‚āĀ | X‚āĀ + X‚āā' # X‚āā | X‚āā + X‚āĀ'] := by
  have A : d[X‚āĀ' | X‚āĀ' + X‚āā' # X‚āĀ | X‚āĀ + X‚āā] = d[X‚āĀ | X‚āĀ + X‚āā' # X‚āĀ' | X‚āā + X‚āĀ'] := by
    apply condRuzsaDist_of_copy hX‚āĀ' (by fun_prop) hX‚āĀ (by fun_prop) hX‚āĀ (by fun_prop) hX‚āĀ'
      (by fun_prop)
    ¬∑ have : IdentDistrib (‚ü®X‚āĀ', X‚āā'‚ü©) (‚ü®X‚āĀ, X‚āā'‚ü©) := by
        apply h‚āĀ.symm.prodMk (.refl hX‚āā'.aemeasurable)
        ¬∑ simpa using h_indep.indepFun (show (2 : Fin 4) ‚Č† 3 by decide)
        ¬∑ simpa using h_indep.indepFun (show (0 : Fin 4) ‚Č† 3 by decide)
      exact this.comp (u := fun (a : G √ó G) ‚Ü¶ (a.1, a.1 + a.2)) (by fun_prop)
    ¬∑ rw [add_comm]
      have : IdentDistrib (‚ü®X‚āĀ, X‚āā‚ü©) (‚ü®X‚āĀ', X‚āā‚ü©) := by
        apply h‚āĀ.prodMk (.refl hX‚āā.aemeasurable)
        ¬∑ simpa using h_indep.indepFun (show (0 : Fin 4) ‚Č† 1 by decide)
        ¬∑ simpa using h_indep.indepFun (show (2 : Fin 4) ‚Č† 1 by decide)
      exact this.comp (u := fun (a : G √ó G) ‚Ü¶ (a.1, a.2 + a.1)) (by fun_prop)
  have B : d[X‚āĀ | X‚āĀ + X‚āā' # X‚āĀ' | X‚āā + X‚āĀ'] = d[X‚āĀ | X‚āĀ + X‚āā' # X‚āā | X‚āā + X‚āĀ'] := by
    have J z w : d[X‚āĀ ; ‚Ąô[|(X‚āĀ + X‚āā') ‚ĀĽ¬Ļ' {z}] # X‚āĀ' ; ‚Ąô[|(X‚āā + X‚āĀ') ‚ĀĽ¬Ļ' {w}]]
        = d[X‚āĀ ; ‚Ąô[|(X‚āĀ + X‚āā') ‚ĀĽ¬Ļ' {z}] # X‚āā ; ‚Ąô[|(X‚āā + X‚āĀ') ‚ĀĽ¬Ļ' {w}]] := by
      rw [‚Üź rdist_add_const hX‚āĀ hX‚āā (c := w)]
      apply (IdentDistrib.refl hX‚āĀ.aemeasurable).rdist_congr
      apply IdentDistrib.of_ae_eq hX‚āĀ'.aemeasurable
      filter_upwards [ae_cond_mem (hX‚āā.add hX‚āĀ' (measurableSet_singleton _))] with x hx
      simp only [mem_preimage, Pi.add_apply, mem_singleton_iff] at hx
      simp [‚Üź hx, ‚Üź add_assoc, ZModModule.add_self (X‚āā x)]
    rw [condRuzsaDist_eq_sum' hX‚āĀ (by fun_prop) hX‚āĀ' (by fun_prop),
      condRuzsaDist_eq_sum' hX‚āĀ (by fun_prop) hX‚āā (by fun_prop)]
    simp [J]
  exact A.trans B

query: if a ‚Č§ b and b < c then a < c

context.enclosing_signature: {G : Type*} {m : ‚Ąē} (hm : m ‚Č• 2) [AddCommGroup G] [Finite G] (htorsion : ‚ąÄ x:G, m ‚ÄĘ x = 0) {k : ‚Ąē} (H : AddSubgroup G) (hk : k ‚Č§ (H : Set G).ncard) (h'k : k ‚Č† 0) : ‚ąÉ (K : AddSubgroup G), (K : Set G).ncard ‚Č§ k ‚ąß k < m * (K : Set G).ncard ‚ąß K ‚Č§ H
hypotheses: S : Set (AddSubgroup G) := {K | K ‚Č§ H ‚ąß Nat.card ‚Ü•K ‚Č§ k}
(fun K => Nat.card ‚Ü•K) K ‚Č§ (fun K => Nat.card ‚Ü•K) j ‚Üí (fun K => Nat.card ‚Ü•K) j ‚Č§ (fun K => Nat.card ‚Ü•K) K
prior_tactics: rcases LE.le.lt_or_eq hK.1 with heq | heq

¬∑ have hneq : (K:Set G) ‚Č† (H:Set G) := by
    contrapose! heq
    simp only [SetLike.coe_set_eq] at heq
    simp only [heq, lt_self_iff_false, not_false_eq_true]
  obtain ‚ü®a, ha, ha'‚ü© := exists_of_ssubset (ssubset_of_subset_of_ne hK.1 hneq)
  let Z := AddSubgroup.zmultiples a
  let H' := K ‚äĒ Z
  contrapose! ha'
  have hcard : Nat.card H' ‚Č§ k := by
    apply le_trans _ ha'
    rw [‚Üź SetLike.coe_sort_coe, ‚Üź SetLike.coe_sort_coe, AddSubgroup.normal_add K Z, Nat.mul_comm]
    calc
      _ ‚Č§ Nat.card (K : Set G) * Nat.card (Z : Set G) := Set.natCard_add_le
      _ ‚Č§ _ := by
        gcongr
        rw [SetLike.coe_sort_coe, Nat.card_zmultiples a]
        apply addOrderOf_le_of_nsmul_eq_zero (Nat.zero_lt_of_lt hm) (htorsion a)
  have hH' : H' ‚Č§ H := by
    simpa only [sup_le_iff, hK.1, AddSubgroup.zmultiples_le, true_and, H', Z]
  have hsub : (K:Set G) ‚äÜ (H':Set G) := SetLike.coe_subset_coe.mpr le_sup_left
  have hcard' : Nat.card K ‚Č§ Nat.card H' := by
      rw [‚Üź SetLike.coe_sort_coe, ‚Üź SetLike.coe_sort_coe, Set.Nat.card_coe_set_eq (K:Set G), Set.Nat.card_coe_set_eq (H':Set G)]
      exact Set.ncard_le_ncard hsub (H' : Set G).toFinite
  have : (K:Set G) = (H':Set G) := by
      apply (Set.subset_iff_eq_of_ncard_le ?_ ?_).mp hsub
      ¬∑ rw [‚Üź Set.Nat.card_coe_set_eq (H':Set G), ‚Üź Set.Nat.card_coe_set_eq (K:Set G)]
        exact hK' ‚ü®hH', hcard‚ü© hcard'
      exact Set.toFinite (H':Set G)
  rw [this]
  exact (le_sup_right : AddSubgroup.zmultiples a ‚Č§ H') (AddSubgroup.mem_zmultiples a)

context.enclosing_signature: {G : Type*} [AddCommGroup G] [Finite G] {m : ‚Ąē} (hm : m ‚Č• 2) (htorsion : ‚ąÄ x:G, m ‚ÄĘ x = 0) {A : Set G} [Finite A] {K : ‚ĄĚ} (h‚āÄA : A.Nonempty) (hA : Nat.card (A + A) ‚Č§ K * A.ncard) : ‚ąÉ (H : AddSubgroup G) (c : Set G), Nat.card c < m * K ^ (256*m^3+1) ‚ąß (H : Set G).ncard ‚Č§ A.ncard ‚ąß A ‚äÜ c + H

  have : 0 < Nat.card H' := Nat.card_pos; positivity
